title: Cobblemon Classic Water GEN1/2
description:
With this small resource pack the water is changed into a  
Pokemon GEN1/2 style water.
body:
# Cobblemon Classic Water GEN1/2 Pack
With this small resource pack the water is changed into a
Pokémon GEN1/2 style water.
The water is animated. ### **Info**
The textures are from the Pokémon games Red/Blue/Green/Yellow(GB(C)) Version
& Gold/Silver/Crystal Version (GBC).
## **Optional Dependecies**
- **[Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)**
### **To-do**
- _Polish textures (give the water a blinking effect)_
## **Credits**
_I did not create or do not own any of these textures/graphics!_
_I used & modified the textures/graphics._
**All credit goes to the rightful owners/creators.**
_**According to Bulbapedia "The graphics used in the games (RGBY)(GSC), are made by:
Satoshi Tajiri, Koji Nishino, Kenji Matsushima, Fumihiro Nonomura, Ryousuke Taniguchi."**_
**Game Design + Map Design:**
**[Satoshi Tajiri](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Satoshi_Tajiri)**
**Map Design:**
**[Kōji Nishino](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/K%C5%8Dji_Nishino)**
**[Kenji Matsusima](https://bulbapedia.bulbagarden.net/wiki/Kenji_Matsushima)**
**[Fumihiro Nonomura](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm6227937/)**
**[Ryohsuke Taniguchi](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm6227936/)**

The_Pok%C3%A9mon_Company)**
